summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new standalone apps (Story Series, Challenge Generator, Tone Switcher) and Regional Pricing module. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - all 3 new app pages load correctly with proper UI elements, forms, and generate buttons. Dashboard displays all 3 new app cards with NEW badges and correct navigation links.
critical_code_review_comments: Story Series API: Pricing correct (3 ep=8, 5 ep=12, 7 ep=18 credits), 5 themes available (Adventure, Friendship, Mystery, Fantasy, Comedy)
Challenge Generator API: Pricing correct (7 day=6, 30 day=15 credits), 5 niches, 3 platforms (instagram, youtube, tiktok), 4 goals
Tone Switcher API: Pricing correct (single=1, batch 5=3, batch 10=5 credits), 5 tones (funny, aggressive, calm, luxury, motivational)
Regional Pricing API: USD and INR currencies supported with correct pricing plans (weekly/monthly/quarterly)
All authentication properly enforced - generate endpoints return 401 without token
Template-based generation confirmed - no AI API costs for any of the 3 new apps
Free Preview feature working correctly in Tone Switcher (no credit deduction)
Dashboard cards have proper gradient styling and NEW badges for all 3 new apps

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 new app pages load correctly with all UI elements

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new apps fully functional. Story Series, Challenge Generator, and Tone Switcher use template-based generation with zero AI costs. Regional pricing supports INR/USD. Demo user has 100 credits available.

elements_verified: Characters section with add character button
Series Settings: Theme selector, Age Group selector
Episode count selection (3/5/7 episodes with pricing)
Total Cost display with dynamic pricing
Choose Tone section with 5 tone options

DASHBOARD_NEW_APP_CARDS.details: All 3 new app cards displayed on dashboard with NEW badges, correct descriptions, and working navigation links

endpoints_tested: /api/pricing/plans - Returns USD/INR pricing with weekly/monthly/quarterly plans
/api/pricing/feature-costs - Returns all feature costs organized by category

TONE_SWITCHER_PREVIEW.details: Free Preview works correctly - shows transformed text without deducting credits

mocked_apis.note: All 3 new apps use template-based generation with zero AI API costs
